headline: 3 Large-Cap Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.

raw.headline: 3 Large-Cap Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
raw.summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.

headline: Some Investors Now Bet the Fed Won’t Cut Rates This Year
summary: The jump in oil and gas prices Monday continues to scramble investors' bets on central-bank interest rates.  Investors now assign the largest probability to the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates just once this year, according to CME Group data.  A week ago, investors had been expecting two cuts.

raw.headline: Some Investors Now Bet the Fed Won’t Cut Rates This Year
raw.summary: The jump in oil and gas prices Monday continues to scramble investors' bets on central-bank interest rates.  Investors now assign the largest probability to the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates just once this year, according to CME Group data.  A week ago, investors had been expecting two cuts.

headline: Some Investors Are Now Betting the Fed Won't Cut Rates This Year
summary: The jump in oil and gas prices Monday continues to scramble investors' bets on central-bank interest rates.  A majority of investors now expect the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates just once this year, according to CME Group data.  A week ago, investors had been expecting two cuts.

raw.headline: Some Investors Are Now Betting the Fed Won't Cut Rates This Year
raw.summary: The jump in oil and gas prices Monday continues to scramble investors' bets on central-bank interest rates.  A majority of investors now expect the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates just once this year, according to CME Group data.  A week ago, investors had been expecting two cuts.

headline: American Airlines Downgraded, Surging Jet Fuel Prices Create Threat
summary: American Airlines receives downgrade. Surging oil, jet fuel prices from Iran and Middle East conflicts create 'existential threat' for airlines.

headline: CME Group Energy Complex Reaches All-Time Daily Volume Record of 8.3 Million Contracts
summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced that its energy complex reached a new single-day volume record of 8.3 million contracts on March 6, surpassing the previous daily record of 7.9 million contracts set on March 3, 2026.

raw.headline: CME Group Energy Complex Reaches All-Time Daily Volume Record of 8.3 Million Contracts

headline: Reported Sunday, CME Group's Four New South Asia Edible Oil Futures Contracts See First Block Trade Of 100 Contracts, Brokered By ICAP On March 5, 2026
summary: Reported Sunday, CME Group's Four New South Asia Edible Oil Futures Contracts See First Block Trade Of 100 Contracts, Brokered By ICAP On March 5, 2026

raw.headline: Reported Sunday, CME Group's Four New South Asia Edible Oil Futures Contracts See First Block Trade Of 100 Contracts, Brokered By ICAP On March 5, 2026

headline: CME Group Announces First Trades for South Asia Crude Palm Oil (Fastmarkets) Futures
summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced a total of 100 contracts of the South Asia Crude Palm Oil (Fastmarkets) futures traded as a block between Avere Commodities and Olam Agri, brokered by ICAP, on March 5, 2026. CME Group launched its four new South Asia edible oil futures contracts, which are available for trading, on March 2, 2026.
